_note: LIVE Acki Nacki shellnet inference-market 4.0.27, relaunched on the new node in dapp 4 on 2026-07-14. Protocol account reads and writes route through dapp_id 4. SuperRoot remains at 0:0c0c...0c0c, and ModelRegistry is the post-restart canonical 0:0d0d...0d0d account. RootPN remains at 0:1010...1010 and intentionally uses the old halo2-sold v1 ext-out build with code hash 44faea57e048ec3eec9a570a91dc9592b25d2d9021a173ca8870ba82fca8b3f6 so the voucher prover can parse VoucherGenerated; its 4.0.27 contract logic is identical to the standard-sold v2 build. All other contract pins match the committed 4.0.27 TVCs and the relaunched shellnet state.
_model_registry: Canonical Model Registry (#209) — owner-curated SET of ModelRegistry seed names (mapping(uint256 nameHash => bool)); the InferenceOrderBook address is DERIVED ON READ (sha256(name) + pinned IOB code hash/depth, mirroring DexLib.computeInferenceOrderBookAddress) — NOT stored, so an IOB pin bump needs no re-cache. Owner = the shellnet SuperRoot key (AiSuperRoot, pub 96e61cae). Version 4.0.18, code_hash 7df7049cf245…, IOB pin 7c1359b8… depth 31 (matches the LIVE 4.0.18 InferenceOrderBook). API: setModel(name), setModels(string[]) bulk ~100/call (merged into the set), removeModel(name), updateCode(TvmCell) — updateCode WIPES the whole set (onCodeUpgrade clean-slate; pubkey owner preserved); getters orderBookOf(name) (registered-only, reverts ERR_NOT_MODEL for an unregistered name, derives on the fly), has(name), modelHashOf(name), count(), inferenceOrderBookCode(). LIVE on shellnet: 0:19a88a103f949df6ce5532a91e935a04acd708872d4bd4e2e5e446d0d78140b9, code_hash 7df7049c, own UNLIMITED DappConfig; seeded 4032 ModelRegistry names (count()=4032; has("Qwen/Qwen3-32B") and has("openai/gpt-oss-20b") are true; names may differ from indexer display refs / normalized producer--model--version strings). Code history via in-place updateCode: cf71128c → 4f3c452c → a385d7b3 → 7df7049c. AFTER the next zerostate restart it is force-placed at the fixed 0:0d0d… in dapp 0 (generate_zerostate.deploy_ai_model_registry) — consumers treat 0:0d0d as the canonical post-restart address and 0:19a88a10 as the pre-restart live instance.
_endpoint: https://shellnet.ackinacki.org (GraphQL /graphql, messages /v2/messages). SDK ChainClient::shellnet() targets this endpoint.
